documentation:
# eth-typing

[![Join the conversation on Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/809793915578089484?color=blue&label=chat&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/GHryRvPB84)
[![Build Status](https://circleci.com/gh/ethereum/eth-typing.svg?style=shield)](https://circleci.com/gh/ethereum/eth-typing)
[![PyPI version](https://badge.fury.io/py/eth-typing.svg)](https://badge.fury.io/py/eth-typing)
[![Python versions](https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/eth-typing.svg)](https://pypi.python.org/pypi/eth-typing)
[![Docs build](https://readthedocs.org/projects/eth-typing/badge/?version=latest)](https://eth-typing.readthedocs.io/en/latest/?badge=latest)

Common type annotations for ethereum python packages.

Read more in the [documentation on ReadTheDocs](https://eth-typing.readthedocs.io/). [View the change log](https://eth-typing.readthedocs.io/en/latest/release_notes.html).

## Quickstart

```sh
python -m pip install eth-typing
```

## Developer Setup

If you would like to hack on eth-typing, please check out the [Snake Charmers
Tactical Manual](https://github.com/ethereum/snake-charmers-tactical-manual)
for information on how we do:

- Testing
- Pull Requests
- Documentation

We use [pre-commit](https://pre-commit.com/) to maintain consistent code style. Once
installed, it will run automatically with every commit. You can also run it manually
with `make lint`. If you need to make a commit that skips the `pre-commit` checks, you
can do so with `git commit --no-verify`.

### Development Environment Setup

You can set up your dev environment with:

```sh
git clone git@github.com:ethereum/eth-typing.git
cd eth-typing
virtualenv -p python3 venv
. venv/bin/activate
python -m pip install -e ".[dev]"
pre-commit install
```

### Network ChainIds

A list of `ChainId` constants reside in the eth-typing/networks.py file. This list should be kept
in sync with the network list available on
[chainid.network](https://chainid.network/chains_mini.json).

To keep the list up to date, run the following command:

```sh
python update_network_chain_ids.py
```

This will remove the original networks file and output a new file with the new networks added.

Check that the output file is correct and that constants are defined as expected. If
the shortName contains special characters it may not work as a constant variable name.
The script should be updated to transform names into valid constants as new cases occur.

### Release setup

To release a new version:

```sh
make release bump=$$VERSION_PART_TO_BUMP$$
```

#### How to bumpversion

The version format for this repo is `{major}.{minor}.{patch}` for stable, and
`{major}.{minor}.{patch}-{stage}.{devnum}` for unstable (`stage` can be alpha or beta).

To issue the next version in line, specify which part to bump,
like `make release bump=minor` or `make release bump=devnum`. This is typically done from the
main branch, except when releasing a beta (in which case the beta is released from main,
and the previous stable branch is released from said branch).

If you are in a beta version, `make release bump=stage` will switch to a stable.

To issue an unstable version when the current version is stable, specify the
new version explicitly, like `make release bump="--new-version 4.0.0-alpha.1 devnum"`

modules.name: eth_typing.discovery
documentation: Types for the Discovery Protocol.

variables.name: eth_typing.discovery.NodeID
documentation:
A 32-byte identifier for a node in the Discovery DHT.

```
.. doctest::

    >>> from eth_typing import NodeID
    >>> NodeID(b'\x01' * 32)
    b'\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01\x01'
```

modules.name: eth_typing.exceptions
documentation: Exception types raised in web3's libraries.

classes.name: eth_typing.exceptions.ValidationError
documentation: Raised when something does not pass a validation check.

classes.name: eth_typing.exceptions.MismatchedABI
documentation:
Raised when an ABI does not match with supplied parameters, or when an
attempt is made to access a function/event that does not exist in the ABI.

modules.name: eth_typing.evm
documentation: Type definitions for the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM).

variables.name: eth_typing.evm.Hash32
documentation: A 32-byte hash value.

variables.name: eth_typing.evm.BlockNumber
documentation: Any integer that represents a valid block number on a chain.

variables.name: eth_typing.evm.BlockParams
documentation:
A type which specifies the block reference parameter.

- `"latest"`: The latest block.
- `"earliest"`: The earliest block.
- `"pending"`: The pending block.
- `"safe"`: The safe block.
- `"finalized"`: The finalized block.

variables.name: eth_typing.evm.BlockIdentifier
documentation:
A type that represents a block identifier value.

- `BlockParams`: A block reference parameter.
- `BlockNumber`: A block number integer value.
- `Hash32`: A 32-byte hash value.
- `HexStr`: A string that represents a hex value.
- `int`: An integer value.

variables.name: eth_typing.evm.Address
documentation: A type that contains a 32-byte canonical address.

variables.name: eth_typing.evm.HexAddress
documentation:
A type that contains a hex encoded address. This is a 32-byte hex string with a prefix
of "0x".

variables.name: eth_typing.evm.ChecksumAddress
documentation:
A type that contains a eth_typing.evm.HexAddress that is formatted according to
`ERC55 <https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/issues/55>`_. This is a 40 character hex
string with a prefix of "0x" and mixed case letters.

variables.name: eth_typing.evm.AnyAddress
documentation: A type that represents any type of address.

modules.name: eth_typing.enums
documentation: Fork names for Ethereum network upgrades.

classes.name: eth_typing.enums.ForkName
documentation:
Constants for each fork name.

```
.. doctest::

    >>> from eth_typing import ForkName
    >>> ForkName.Frontier
    'Frontier'
```

modules.name: eth_typing.abi
documentation: Types for Contract ABIs and related components.

variables.name: eth_typing.abi.TypeStr
documentation: String representation of a data type.

variables.name: eth_typing.abi.Decodable
documentation: Binary data to be decoded.

variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABICallable
documentation:
A `Union` type consisting of `ABIFunction`, `ABIConstructor`, `ABIFallback` and
`ABIReceive` types.

variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIElement
documentation: A `Union` type consisting of `ABICallable`, `ABIEvent`, and `ABIError` types.

variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABI
documentation:
List of components representing function and event interfaces
(elements of an ABI).

classes.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIComponent

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIComponent.name
documentation: Name of the component.

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIComponent.type
documentation: Type of the component.

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIComponent.components
documentation: List of nested `ABI` components for ABI types.
TypedDict representing an `ABIElement` component.

classes.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIComponentIndexed

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIComponentIndexed.indexed
documentation: If True, component can be used as a topic filter.
TypedDict representing an indexed `ABIElement` component.

classes.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIEvent

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIEvent.name
documentation: Event name identifier.

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIEvent.type
documentation: Event ABI type.

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIEvent.anonymous
documentation: If True, event is anonymous. Cannot filter the event by name.

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIEvent.inputs
documentation: Input components for the event.
TypedDict to represent the `ABI` for an event.

classes.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIFunctionType

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIFunctionType.stateMutability
documentation: State mutability of the constructor.

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIFunctionType.payable
documentation:
Contract is payable to receive ether on deployment.
Deprecated in favor of stateMutability payable and nonpayable.

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIFunctionType.constant
documentation:
Function is constant and does not change state.
Deprecated in favor of stateMutability pure and view.

TypedDict representing the `ABI` for all function types.

This is the base type for functions.
Please use ABIFunction, ABIConstructor, ABIFallback or ABIReceive instead.

classes.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIFunction

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIFunction.type
documentation: Type of the function.

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIFunction.name
documentation: Name of the function.

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIFunction.inputs
documentation: Function input components.

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIFunction.outputs
documentation: Function output components.
TypedDict representing the `ABI` for a function.

classes.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIConstructor

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIConstructor.type
documentation: Type of the constructor function.

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIConstructor.inputs
documentation: Function input components.
TypedDict representing the `ABI` for a constructor function.

classes.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIFallback

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIFallback.type
documentation: Type of the fallback function.
TypedDict representing the `ABI` for a fallback function.

classes.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIReceive

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIReceive.type
documentation: Type of the receive function.
TypedDict representing the `ABI` for a receive function.

classes.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIError

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIError.type
documentation: Type of the error.

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIError.name
documentation: Name of the error.

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIError.inputs
documentation: Error input components.
TypedDict representing the `ABI` for an error.

classes.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIElementInfo

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIElementInfo.abi
documentation: ABI for any `ABIElement` type.

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIElementInfo.selector
documentation: Solidity `ABIElement` selector sighash.

class_variables.name: eth_typing.abi.ABIElementInfo.arguments
documentation: `ABIElement` input components.

TypedDict to represent properties of an `ABIElement`, including the abi,
selector and arguments.

modules.name: eth_typing.bls
documentation: Types used for BLS Signatures.

variables.name: eth_typing.bls.BLSPubkey
documentation: A BLS public key that is 48 bytes in length.

variables.name: eth_typing.bls.BLSPrivateKey
documentation: A BLS private key integer value.

variables.name: eth_typing.bls.BLSSignature
documentation: A BLS signature that is 96 bytes in length.

modules.name: eth_typing.encoding
documentation: Types for encoding and decoding data.

variables.name: eth_typing.encoding.HexStr
documentation: A string that represents a hex encoded value.

variables.name: eth_typing.encoding.Primitives
documentation: A type that represents bytes, int or bool primitive types.
